sutta: the buddha said monks 11 advantages are to be looked for from the radiation by mind of loving-kindness by making a loving kindness grow by making much of it by making loving kindness a vehicle and basis by persisting in it by becoming familiar with it by well establishing it what are the 11 1 sleeps happy and wakes happy he dreams no evil dream he is dear to human beings and non-human beings are like the devas or heavenly beings guard him fire poison or sword affect him not quickly he concentrates his mind his complexion is serene he makes an end or he dies without bewilderment it means unconfused and if he has penetrated no further he reaches upon dying the brahma world these 11 advantages are to be looked for from the radiation by mind of loving kindness by making loving-kindness grow by making much of it by making loving-kindness a vehicle and basis by persisting in it by becoming familiar with it by well establishing it that's the end of the suta
commentary: [Music] here i have translated this radiation by mind of loving kindness here this in the polytech society book they have it as the release of heart by the practice of enmity release i uh it's like liberation liberation here i prefer the word radiation are you radiate loving kindness by the mind in the sutas the buddha has said now that to practice loving kindness we should first attain the jana at least the first jana because if a person has attained jhana the mind is strong then when he practices radiating out the loving kindness it is possible but if we don't have a strong mind we try to radiate the loving kindness other beings cannot feel it so if a person can practice this radiation by mind of loving kindness it means he has attained the jhanas and if a person has attained the jhanas so he gets these benefits by practicing methala he sleeps happy and wakes happy he dreams no evil dream he is dear to human beings and non-human beings alike because he's always having meta the devas guard him fire poison or sword affect him not this 1 is because the devas guard him sometimes people think even if he takes poison he won't die but it's not he i don't think it's in that sense la there is a sense that because he is protected by devasa then even if he were to maybe take some some poison or anything or or fire or sword anything might want to harm him but the devas will protect him and then he can concentrate his mind quickly his complexion is very serene and he dies unconfused and he has if he has not attained to arahan hudna he will attain to the brahma world brahma world is in the form [Music] realm rupa loka and in the form realm generally you should have jhana to be able to be reborn then so these are the advantages of practicing meta loving-kindness so with that now i come to the end of the angutra nikaya

items: dear to non-human beings / guarded by devas
fire poison or sword do not affect him quickly
if penetrated no further (not fully liberated)
reaches the Brahma world upon dying
chain.category: advantages of radiation by mind of loving-kindness (mettā)
